title: Compliance: python/src/lichen/crypto/identity.py key storage
description: Policy: 06-security.md §15.2. File: python/src/lichen/crypto/identity.py. Status: COMPLIANT. Uses mutable bytearray for seed/privkey with zeroing. Explicit security note about Python limitations. Debug repr shows REDACTED. wipe() method and __del__ zeroing.
notes:
Links to epic: echd (Security Compliance Audit)
Removed wipe() - out of threat model (Python can't securely erase memory)
